license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.dys7wd
title: 1% SDS in DNA Buffer
author: Andrew Baker

steps_raw.instruction: Prepare stock solution of 4 M Sodium chloride in MilliQ water Sodium chloride P212121
Prepare stock solution of 0.5 M EDTA in MilliQ water Ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid Contributed by users
Mix 50 mL 4 M NaCl and 50 mL 0.5 M EDTA
Make up to a final volume of 500 mL with MilliQ water MilliQ water Contributed by users
Dissolve SDS in DNA Buffer to a final concentration of 1% (w/v). e.g., 5 g SDS in 500 mL of DNA Buffer. Sodium Dodecyl Sulfate P212121
